auth_stale_detail: The app will attempt to reconnect to the server once the connection is restored
offline_boot_title: AsterDrive is having trouble reaching the server
offline_boot_description: This session could not be restored and the backend is temporarily unreachable. The app is ready, but some features will stay unavailable until the network or service recovers.
offline_boot_hint: If you have signed in before, refresh after the service recovers to continue where you left off.
